news.headline: GM discontinues Cruise robotaxi business amid shifts in self-driving strategy, focusing on investments in new technologies.
Chinese law enforcement introduces RT-G robot by Shenzhen's Logon Technology, combining futuristic design with potent crime-fighting capabilities.
news.summary: The RT-G robot, created by Shenzhen's Logon Technology, combines futuristic design elements with practical and potentially dangerous uses.

news.headline: Japan non-manufacturing index up to +30 in December from +19 in November
Japan's manufacturing sentiment drops to -1 in December from +5 in November: Source Tankan
Japan's Tankan survey forecasts a +5 index for manufacturers and +32 index for non-manufacturers in March.
South Korea sees November jobless rate at 2.7%: Est. 2.8%
S. Korean Unemployment Rate Actual 2.7% (Forecast 2.8%, Previous 2.7%)
Wall Street veteran warns against Fed's rate cut plans before Dec. 18 meeting, amid expectations of 25bps cut.
news.summary: The Federal Reserve is expected to cut interest rates by 25 basis points during its Dec. 18 meeting, with a 90% probability of the move as per fed funds futures. Wall Street veteran Ed Yardeni advises against further rate cuts, warning of overheating the economy and market instability in 2025. Yardeni suggests the Fed stands pat at the upcoming meeting, given aggressive rate cuts earlier in the year leading to risks of inflation and stock market euphoria. Yardeni indicates the potential conflict with the Fed's dual mandate of stable prices and full employment, as inflation remains a concern despite a strong labor market. For more details, visit Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Investment firm Thunder Bridge IV acquires Coincheck Group N.V., trading on Nasdaq under THCP, with Coincheck shares now open.
news.summary: In a recent update from Great Falls, Virginia and Amsterdam, Coincheck Group N.V., a Dutch company overseeing a cryptocurrency trading service, has successfully merged with Thunder Bridge Capital Partners IV, Inc. (Nasdaq: THCP, THCPU & THCPW), a special purpose acquisition company. This business combination has been finalized and marks the beginning of trading for Coincheck's ordinary shares and warrants.

news.headline: Toys market in Europe projected to grow by USD 9.27 billion (2024-2028) fueled by premiumization and AI trends - Technavio.
news.summary: A recent analysis highlights the transformative impact of AI on the market landscape, particularly in Europe's toys sector. Predictions indicate a significant growth, with the market set to increase by approximately USD 9.27 billion between 2024 and 2028. This expansion is projected to occur at a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 4.39% throughout the forecast period.

news.headline: NASA's podcasts became popular in 2024, reaching many listeners on Spotify Wrapped. Astronaut Nick Hague discussed space journey.
news.summary: On December 10, 2024, NASA made strides in audio storytelling as Spotify Wrapped announced their podcasts were popular worldwide. NASA astronaut Nick Hague discussed space exploration in honor of this achievement.

news.headline: Trump's Treasury pick Bessent sees Powell serving remainder of term: CNBC
Magnifica sets new luxury living standard, launches at Dr. Phillips Performing Arts Center with 1,500 guests.
news.summary: In Orlando, Florida on December 10, 2024, Magnifica unveiled their new luxury project at the Dr. Phillips Performing Arts Center. The launch event saw more than 1,500 distinguished guests, showcasing a new benchmark for upscale living. The event included influential figures from various industries.

news.headline: Diesel gensets market in GCC to grow by USD 310.45M (2024-2028) with CAGR of 5.56%, boosted by low operating costs & AI.
news.summary: A recent report analyzing the impact of artificial intelligence on market trends predicts significant growth for the diesel gensets market in the GCC region. With an estimated increase of USD 310.45 million expected between 2024 and 2028, the market is projected to grow at a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) exceeding 5.56% during this forecast period.

news.headline: U.S. Bancorp reveals quarterly dividend payouts, providing returns to shareholders.
Airwallex sees 83% revenue increase across APAC YoY with 49% transaction volume growth in Q3, - globally revenue up 73%.
news.summary: Singapore-based company Airwallex has announced significant growth in the Asia Pacific (APAC) region. In the third quarter, the company experienced an 83% year-on-year revenue increase and a 49% growth in transaction volume in APAC. Globally, Airwallex reported a 73% year-on-year increase in revenue and a 60% increase in transaction volume. This success demonstrates the company's position as a leading global payments and financial operating platform for modern businesses.

news.headline: Performant Financial Corporation changes name to Performant Healthcare, Inc. on Nasdaq, new ticker symbol PHLT; maintains services.
news.summary: A technology-enabled payment integrity and analytics services provider, Performant Financial Corporation (Nasdaq: PFMT), based in Plantation, Fla., has officially rebranded as Performant Healthcare, Inc. The company plans to update its ticker symbol to PHLT, while assuring its stakeholders that the name change and new symbol will not affect its operations, management or structure. The name change is aimed at aligning with the company's strategic direction, emphasizing its focus on healthcare services. As a prominent player in the industry, Performant continues to offer its services uninterrupted amidst the rebranding efforts.

news.headline: VIQ Solutions' COO Susan Sumner retires; continues as advisor until Jan. 31, 2025. She served as President too.
news.summary: In Ontario, VIQ Solutions Inc. (TSX: VQS) has declared the retirement of Susan Sumner as Chief Operating Officer and President. As a global provider of AI-driven voice and video capture technology, the company announced that Ms. Sumner will act as a part-time advisor until January 31, 2025. Following her retirement, she disclosed that she will step down from her position.

news.headline: Satellogic closes $10M private placement and files shelf registration statement.
news.summary: Satellogic, a New York-based company, recently announced the completion of a private placement worth $10 million. Additionally, the company has filed a shelf registration statement.

news.headline: Milei: Shutdown of Argentina's Central Bank to Take 4 Years
Global 5G testing equipment market to expand by $605.76 million (2024-2028), driven by growing network demand and AI-powered market transformation.
news.summary: In a recent report analyzing the influence of artificial intelligence on market dynamics, it was revealed that the global market size for 5G testing equipment is projected to increase by approximately USD 605.76 million between 2024 and 2028. Technavio forecasts indicate a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of close to 8.43% for the market during this period.

news.headline: Allegiant Air Teamsters pilots vote 97.4% to authorize strike for better wages and working conditions. Practice picket in Sarasota.
news.summary: In Sarasota, Florida, on December 10th, 2024, pilots from Allegiant Air Teamsters voted overwhelmingly, with 97.4% in favor, to approve a strike in demand for improved wages and working conditions. Tomorrow, on December 11th, these pilots will conduct a practice picket at Sarasota Bradenton International Airport, a crucial hub for Allegiant Air.

news.headline: Teamsters support injunction against Kroger-Albertsons merger. Dec. 10, 2024. Statement by President Sean O'Brien.
news.summary: A preliminary injunction has been issued to stop an anti-competitive and anti-worker mega-merger in Washington on December 10, 2024. Teamsters General President Sean M. O'Brien and Teamsters Warehouse Division Director Tom Erickson released a statement about this decision. The injunction aims to halt the merger that could have adverse effects on competition and labor conditions. The development marks a significant step in preventing potential harm to market dynamics and workers.

news.headline: Ready Capital Corp closed $130 million public offering of 9.00% Senior Notes due 2029, incl $15 million from over-allotment. Proceeds for investments.
news.summary: On December 10, 2024, Ready Capital Corporation (NYSE: RC) announced the completion of an underwritten public offering, raising $130 million through the issuance of 9.00% Senior Notes due 2029. This amount includes an additional $15 million from the exercise of the underwriters’ over-allotment option. The Notes were issued in denominations of $25.00 or multiples thereof. The proceeds will be used for acquiring or originating target assets in line with the company’s investment strategy and for general corporate purposes. The offering was managed by Morgan Stanley & Co. LLC, Piper Sandler & Co., RBC Capital Markets, LLC, UBS Investment Bank, and Wells Fargo Securities, LLC.

news.headline: Google's new Willow quantum processor is sparking debate on its potential to break Bitcoin with its advanced capabilities.
news.summary: The unveiling of Google's latest Willow quantum processor is fueling conversations about the security of blockchain technology in the face of swift advancements. The quantum processor's introduction has sparked interest as it brings to the forefront the potential implications for blockchain security in the future. This development underscores the need for the blockchain community to stay vigilant and adaptive as quantum technologies continue to progress.

news.headline: Allegiant Air Teamsters pilots to practice picket at CVG International demanding better wages, with 97.4% vote for strike.
news.summary: Allegiant Air Teamsters pilots in Hebron, Ky., are demanding improved wages and working conditions. A vote, with a 97.4% majority, has been conducted to authorize a strike. In response, pilots will stage a practice picket on Dec. 11 at Cincinnati & Northern Kentucky International Airport, a crucial location for Allegiant Air operations. The pilots are calling attention to the need for better pay and working conditions through this demonstration.

news.headline: Capital Southwest receives approval from SBA to submit 2nd SBIC license application. News announced on Dec.10, 2024.
news.summary: On December 10, 2024, in Dallas, Capital Southwest Corporation, a business development company traded on Nasdaq under CSWC, revealed they had received approval from the U.S. Small Business Administration to proceed with their application for a license to establish a second Small Business Investment Company subsidiary. This subsidiary aims to offer flexible financing solutions to aid in the acquisition and growth of middle market businesses. This step signifies a positive development in their expansion plans.

news.headline: California American Water assists Ventura County customers affected by Mountain Fire with protection program.
news.summary: In response to the recent Mountain Fire in Thousand Oaks, California, California American Water has implemented its customer protection program for residents in its Ventura County District. This initiative specifically targets customers in the Las Posas Estates water system who have been affected by mandatory and recommended evacuations. Unfortunately, many individuals in this area have suffered losses such as damage to homes and businesses. Affected customers are urged to take advantage of the customer protection program to receive assistance and support during this challenging time.

news.headline: Pilates Equipment Market to witness 12% CAGR with USD 146.3 million growth by 2028, North America contributing 37% - Technavio.
news.summary: A recent report utilizing artificial intelligence has projected significant growth in the global pilates equipment market. The market size is expected to increase by approximately USD 146.3 million between 2024 and 2028, with a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of around 12% throughout the forecast period.

news.headline: Global smart healthcare market estimated to grow by USD 125.7 billion (2024-2028) at 9.31% CAGR, impacted by AI - Technavio.
news.summary: In New York on December 10, 2024, a report was released detailing the impact of AI on the market. The global smart healthcare market is projected to increase by USD 125.7 billion between 2024 and 2028, as estimated by Technavio. The market is expected to grow at a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 9.31% throughout the forecast period.

news.headline: Last mile delivery market in North America to grow by $18.78 billion (2024-2028) due to US B2C e-commerce and AI.
news.summary: In a recent report, it was highlighted how artificial intelligence (AI) is significantly influencing market dynamics. Specifically, the last mile delivery market in North America is projected to witness substantial growth, with an estimated increase of USD 18.78 billion anticipated between 2024 and 2028, as per Technavio. The market is expected to maintain a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 4.93% throughout this period.

news.headline: MIND Technology surpasses Q3 earnings expectations by 2108%, reports EPS of $2.87. More details on Benzinga.com.
news.summary: In the third quarter of the fiscal year, MIND Technology (NASDAQ:MIND) released its earnings report on Tuesday, December 10, 2024, at 04:15 PM. The key takeaway for investors is that MIND Technology surpassed the estimated earnings by an impressive margin of 2108.0%, revealing an earnings per share (EPS) of $2.87. For more details, the complete story can be found on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Premier Health Inc. (TSXV: PHA) reported Q4 2024 revenue of $33.5M, up from $23.4M in 2023. Gross margin at 15.9% of revenue.
news.summary: On December 10, 2024, Premier Health of America Inc. (TSXV: PHA), a prominent Canadian Healthtech company, disclosed the submission of its Audited Annual Consolidated Financial Statements and MD&A for the fiscal year ending on September 30, 2024.Key figures include:- Revenues for the 3-month period ending on September 30, 2024, were $33,459, compared to $23,405 for the same period in 2023. For the 12-month period ending on September 30, 2024, revenues amounted to $158,191, a significant increase from $90,390 in the previous year.- The gross margin for the 3-month period ending on September 30, 2024, was $5,326, down from $6,036 in the same period in 2023. For the 12-month period ending on September 30, 2024, the gross margin stood at $27,895, showing growth from $23,345 in the previous year.- The gross margin as a percentage of revenues was 15.9% for the 3-month period ending on September 30, 2024, compared to 25.8% for the same period in 2023. For the 12-month period ending on September 30, 2024, the gross margin as a percentage of revenues was 17.6%.These financial outcomes mark notable developments for Premier Health of America Inc.

news.headline: Dave & Buster's disappoints in Q3, revenue $453M vs estimated $563.6M. Reported loss 45 cents per share. Total revenue down 3%, comparable store sales drop 7.7%. CEO transition announced.
news.summary: Dave & Buster’s Entertainment Inc (NASDAQ:PLAY) experienced a decline in shares during after-hours trading following the release of their third-quarter financial results and announcement of a CEO transition. The company reported revenue of $453 million for the quarter, falling short of analyst expectations of $563.6 million. Additionally, they reported an adjusted loss of 45 cents per share, contrasting with the anticipated positive earnings of 90 cents per share. Total revenue decreased by 3% compared to the previous year, attributed to a 7.7% drop in comparable store sales. As of the end of the quarter, Dave & Buster’s held $8.6 million in cash and had $537.4 million available under a $650 million revolving credit facility.

news.headline: American Lithium plans to delist its shares from the Nasdaq and deregister with the SEC by Dec 27, 2024.
news.summary: American Lithium Corp. has received approval from its Board of Directors to voluntarily delist its common shares from the Nasdaq Capital Market and deregister with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission. The company, trading under the symbols TSX-V:LI, Nasdaq:AMLI, and Frankfurt:5LA1, has informed Nasdaq of its decision. It plans to file a Form 25 with the SEC on or around December 20, 2024, initiating the delisting and deregistration process. The delisting will be effective ten days after this filing, with the last trading day on Nasdaq set for December 27, 2024.

news.headline: Indonesia retail market to grow by $49.56B (2024-2028) with 4.73% CAGR, AI playing key role - Technavio.
news.summary: A recent report utilizing AI technology forecasts significant growth in the retail market of Indonesia. According to Technavio, the market is projected to increase by USD 49.56 billion between 2024 and 2028. This growth is expected to occur at a steady CAGR of 4.73% throughout the forecast period.

news.headline: Ouster transfers stock exchange listing to Nasdaq from NYSE, including common stock and warrants symbols "OUST.WSA" and "OUST.WS".
news.summary: In San Francisco, Ouster, Inc. disclosed its decision to move its common stock and warrants trading under symbols "OUST" and "OUST.WSA" to Nasdaq Global Select Market from NYSE. Simultaneously, the company will transfer its warrants trading under "OUST.WS" symbol to Nasdaq Capital Market from NYSE American. The transition involves the 2025 Public Warrants and 2026 Public Warrants. This strategic shift signifies a significant move for Ouster, Inc. (NYSE: OUST) in the financial market.

news.headline: Liontown delivers first shipment to long-term foundational customer
Allegiant Air Teamsters pilots demand better wages and working conditions, vote 97.4% to authorize strike; hold practice picket in Orlando.
news.summary: Pilots at Allegiant Air are advocating for improved wages and working conditions, with an overwhelming 97.4% voting in favor of strike authorization. In a move to demonstrate their dissatisfaction, pilots will conduct a practice picket at the Orlando Sanford International Airport, a crucial hub for Allegiant Air, on Wednesday, Dec. 11, 2024. This action comes as a demand for better treatment and fair compensation for the pilots, highlighting their solidarity and determination to see change in their workplace.

news.headline: Global aggregates market to grow by USD 51.86 billion (2024-2028) due to AI and construction investments.
news.summary: On December 10, 2024, it was reported that artificial intelligence (AI) is playing a significant role in transforming the market. The global aggregates market is projected to witness a substantial growth of USD 51.86 billion between 2024 and 2028, as stated by Technavio. It is anticipated that the market will expand at a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 5.2% throughout the forecast period.

news.headline: Tokio Marine NA named #2 in Small Companies category on Computerworld's 2025 Best Places to Work in IT list.
news.summary: For the third year in a row, Tokio Marine North America Services (TMNAS) from BALA CYNWYD, Pa., has been named to the prestigious Best Places to Work in IT list. The company achieved a remarkable rank of #2 in the Small Companies category. This recognition, revealed on Dec. 10, 2024, solidifies TMNAS as one of the top workplaces for IT professionals in 2025.

news.headline: Cboe Global Markets (CBOE) to release Q4 2024 financial results on Feb 7, 2025, after market opens.
news.summary: On December 10, 2024, Cboe Global Markets, Inc. (Cboe: CBOE), a major derivatives and securities exchange network, is set to reveal its financial performance for Q4 2024 prior to the market opening on Friday, February 7, 2025. Interested parties can join a conference call to discuss these results.

news.headline: Last mile delivery market to grow by USD 60.82 billion (2024-2028) due to e-commerce and AI, at 5.12% CAGR - Technavio.
news.summary: On December 10, 2024, a report utilizing AI technology projected significant growth in the global last mile delivery market. It is anticipated to increase by USD 60.82 billion between 2024 and 2028, as per findings by Technavio. The market's compound annual growth rate (CAGR) during this period is expected to be 5.12%.

news.headline: Nail care market to grow by $5.96B (2023-2028) through AI-powered transformation, says Technavio.
news.summary: A recent report highlights the impact of AI on market dynamics, indicating a projected increase in the global nail care products market by approximately USD 5.96 billion between 2024 and 2028. Among the key findings provided by Technavio, a growth rate of around 4.3% is expected during this period, signifying significant market expansion driven by artificial intelligence technologies.

news.headline: Global veterinary vaccines market expected to exceed USD 16 billion by 2030 due to rising zoonotic diseases and antimicrobial resistance concerns.
news.summary: In Las Vegas on December 10, 2024, it was reported that the veterinary vaccines market is witnessing strong growth. This growth is being fueled by factors including the rise in zoonotic diseases, increasing worries about antimicrobial resistance in animals, and a growing need for safe and effective food production. The market is experiencing significant expansion with pivotal numbers showcasing a surge in demand for veterinary vaccines to address these pressing concerns.

news.headline: EHang Holdings ADR receives Relative Strength Rating boost, indicating improving technical performance. Will the upward trend continue?
news.summary: EHang Holdings ADR has seen an upgrade in its Relative Strength Rating, indicating improved technical performance. Investors are curious if this positive trend will persist.

news.headline: Amazon stock's target price increased after generative AI-focused conference, reaching new heights.
news.summary: A stock analyst for Amazon has increased the target for AMZN shares after the company held a conference focusing on their generative AI cloud services. The target price for Amazon stock has been raised in response to the positive momentum surrounding their AI innovations.

news.headline: Kroger's $24.6 billion merger with Albertsons blocked by judge, impacting U.S. grocery competition. Stock price rises.
news.summary: A judge from the district has decided to block Kroger's acquisition of Albertsons for $24.6 billion as it was anticipated to lessen competition for grocery shoppers in the U.S. Consequently, the deal is likely to be halted. This decision has led to a rise in Kroger's stock value, as reported by Investor's Business Daily.

news.headline: NewAmsterdam Pharma's stock jumps 41% as cholesterol drug shows reduction in major heart events.
news.summary: On Tuesday, NewAmsterdam Pharma announced that its cholesterol drug has been found to reduce the risk of major cardiovascular events, leading to a significant increase in the biotech company's stock price. Following this news, NewAmsterdam Pharma's stock soared by 41%. This unexpected benefit from the cholesterol drug marks a significant milestone for the company, showcasing the potential impact of their pharmaceutical development.

news.headline: Paessler's new PRTG Data Hub enhances IT-security collaboration, reduces network traffic, cuts costs. Chicago, Dec 10, 2024.
news.summary: Paessler has revealed its new PRTG Data Hub extension in Chicago on December 10, 2024. This extension aims to assist IT professionals and organizations in cutting costs and enhancing network traffic optimization. With this latest addition, users can expect streamlined compliance management while potentially saving significant amounts of money.
